storage_api.known_limitation: storage-api image version drift warning may appear on supabase start when local Docker image differs from linked cloud project. Supabase CLI 2.90.0 does not support governed repo-based image pinning for storage-api. Warning is cosmetic and non-blocking unless a real Storage behavior mismatch is observed. Re-check alignment after CLI upgrades or hosted project storage upgrades. See 10.8.11Q.
